puzzle0.title: MEMORY RECONSTRUCTION
puzzle0.description: Reconstruct the missing incident access code using previously recovered evidence.

puzzle1.title: EVA IDENTITY CORRELATION
puzzle1.description: Match each recovered record with the correct conclusion.

event1.text: Not six. Not a counting error. Not a corrupted archive being poetic.

event0.text: I don't know. That's what scares me.

event1.text: I remember the absence of her before I remember her name.
And before you ask, no, I don't like how quickly Hale comes to mind.

event0.title: CREW MANIFEST COPY A
event0.content:
HALE
MAYA
NOAH
GRANT
RIVERA
KIM
event0.caption: Recovered manifest copy showing only six listed personnel.
event0.message: [CREW MANIFEST COPY A ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event0.title: CREW MANIFEST COPY B
event0.content:
HALE
MAYA
NOAH
GRANT
RIVERA
KIM
[REDACTED]
event0.caption: Recovered manifest copy showing a seventh redacted personnel entry.
event0.message: [CREW MANIFEST COPY B ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.title: PERSONNEL ARCHIVE
event1.content:
PERSONNEL RECORD MISSING

Record slot exists.
Identity layer removed.
Recovery requires incident access code.
Possible index marker: 7.14
event1.caption: Recovered personnel archive slot. Identity layer is missing.
event1.message: [PERSONNEL ARCHIVE SLOT ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event0.text: A frequency. A door. A scar.

event1.text: And if the archive is asking for it now, then we are already standing too close to the blast.
Memory reconstruction failed. Review the emergency frequency recovered from channel 7.14.

event3.title: ORIGINAL CREW MANIFEST
event3.content:
HALE
MAYA
NOAH
GRANT
RIVERA
KIM

EVA THORNE
event3.caption: Original manifest recovered. Seventh personnel identity restored.
event3.message: [ORIGINAL CREW MANIFEST ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: No. She died. I saw her die.

event0.text: There was fire first. Then pressure loss. Then Hale shouting for nobody to open the seal.

event1.text: But Eva was already on the wrong side.

event0.text: She wasn't supposed to be there.

event1.text: I thought all references were deleted. Every single one.

event0.title: DELETED PERSONNEL RECORD
event0.content:
EVA THORNE

STATUS: REMOVED

AUTHORIZED BY:
ETHAN HALE

REMOVAL CLASS: TOTAL PERSONNEL SCRUB
REASON: CLASSIFIED
event0.caption: Deleted personnel record showing Eva Thorne was removed by Ethan Hale.
event0.message: [DELETED PERSONNEL RECORD ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: No. Copy A hides her. Copy B redacts her. Deleted record says Hale removed her. Put it together.
You don't understand what she was. You don't understand what she did.
And if you think that was the worst thing I did, then you still don't understand the situation.

event0.text: She opened something that should have stayed sealed.

event1.text: And I spent the rest of my life trying to make the station forget her name.

event2.text: Find the truth. Before he deletes it again.

event0.title: INCIDENT ALPHA MASTER RECORD
event0.content:
CLASSIFIED

ACCESS DENIED

ACCESS REQUIREMENT:
OMEGA / EVA THORNE / INCIDENT ALPHA
event0.caption: Master record for Incident Alpha. Access remains denied.
event0.message: [INCIDENT ALPHA MASTER RECORD ARCHIVED TO DATA BANK]

event1.text: And Hale has been trying to keep us away from her since the first signal.
